mission.title: external-secrets: Add github actions secrets as a provider?
mission.description: Add github actions secrets as a provider?. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current external-secrets deployment
steps.description:
Verify your external-secrets version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets
helm list -n external-secrets 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working external-secrets installation.

steps.title: Review external-secrets configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant external-secrets configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets
kubectl get configmap -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=external-secrets
```
I couldn't find an existing ticket but apologies if this already came up. I was hoping you could add github secrets (used in github actions) as a potential provider.

**What is the added value?**
This would save us a hop.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add github actions secrets as a provider?
steps.description:
## Problem Statement

What is the problem you're trying to solve?
I'm implementing the github secret store provider
Implements part of #1727 
How do you like to solve the issue and why?
I have implemented the start of the github provider for external secrets based on github actions organisations secrets.

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets
kubectl get events -n external-secrets --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add github actions secrets as a provider?" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Problem Statement

What is the problem you're trying to solve?
I'm implementing the github secret store provider
Implements part of #1727 
How do you like to solve the issue and why?
I have implemented the start of the github provider for external secrets based on github actions organisations secrets.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with external-secrets installed or the issue environment reproducible.
